calendar.matters:
COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Sep-16-2002 Judgment Entered

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Sep-12-2002 Continued To Sep-16-02 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Sep-16-2002 Assigned To Trial Court

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-12-2002 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause comes on regular calendar this day for settlement conference. Plaintiff appearing by and through counsel, Jonathan Bornstein, Esq., and there being no appearance by the defendant, the court orders the request for jury trial stricken. Trial date is confirmed.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-27-2002 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-26-2002 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Cause assigned to Dept. 218 for settlement conference. Judge: Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Mary Hinds. Defendant appeared in pro per. Counsel for plaintiff, Jonathan H. Bornstein, Esq. not present at calendar call and so the Court took the settlement conference off calendar and vacated the trial date of September 3,2002.
